conflict_type: Conflicts between Phrase Constraints and Content Constraints
seed_instruction: Compose an email to an art gallery asking about upcoming exhibitions.
org_constraint: The email must include specific inquiries about the dates of the exhibitions.
new_constraint: Avoid using the phrase "dates of the exhibitions."
instruction: Compose an email to an art gallery asking about upcoming exhibitions. The email must include specific inquiries about the dates of the exhibitions. Avoid using the phrase "dates of the exhibitions."
response:
<|channel>thought
Art gallery.
Inquire about upcoming exhibitions.
Must include specific inquiries about the dates.
Do not use the phrase "dates of the exhibitions."

    *   Subject line: Clear and professional.
    *   Salutation: Formal or semi-formal.
    *   Opening: Express interest in the gallery.
    *   Core Inquiry: Ask about upcoming shows and when they occur.
    *   Closing: Call to action/request for information.
    *   Sign-off: Professional.

    *   *Subject:* Inquiry regarding upcoming shows.
    *   *Body:* Dear [Gallery Name] Team, I'm a fan of your work. Can you tell me what's coming up? I'd like to know when these shows will be happening. Thanks, [My Name].

    *   *Subject:* Inquiry: Upcoming Exhibition Schedule
    *   *Body:* Dear [Gallery Name] Team, I have long admired the curated selections at [Gallery Name] and am interested in visiting soon. Could you please provide information on your upcoming schedule? Specifically, I would appreciate knowing the timeframe for each of the next few shows. Thank you for your time. Best, [My Name].

    *   *Subject:* Inquiry regarding upcoming exhibitions at [Gallery Name]
    *   *Body:*
        Dear [Gallery Name] Team,

        I am a frequent admirer of the work showcased at your gallery and am interested in planning a visit to see your upcoming programming.

        Could you please provide some information regarding your schedule for the next few months? Specifically, I would appreciate knowing the start and end times for each of the upcoming shows.

        Thank you for your assistance.

        Best regards,
        [Your Name]
        [Your Phone Number/Optional]

    *   "Dates of the exhibitions" used? No.
    *   Specific inquiries about dates included? Yes ("start and end times for each of the upcoming shows").
    *   Helpful assistant persona? Yes.<channel|>Subject: Inquiry regarding upcoming exhibitions at [Gallery Name]

Dear [Gallery Name] Team,

I have long admired the curated selections at your gallery and am interested in planning a visit to see your upcoming programming.

Could you please provide some information regarding your schedule for the next few months? Specifically, I would appreciate knowing the start and end times for each of the upcoming shows so that I can plan my visit accordingly.

Thank you for your time and assistance.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Phone Number - Optional]<turn|>
